title: _Static_assert size guards in wolftpm_rs_shim.c detect struct layout changes
description: wolftpm_rs_shim.c lines 60-63: _Static_assert checks on sizeof(TPM2_CTX) and sizeof(WOLFTPM2_DEV) catch wolfTPM version upgrades that restructure internal structs. Since the shim accesses dev->ctx.cmdBuf directly (an internal field), any struct change will fail to compile rather than silently corrupt memory. This is the correct failure mode and should be defended against removal.
